differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with granulomatous-lymphocytic interstitial lung disease (GLILD)
Occult malignancy (e.g., metastatic carcinoma or lymphoma with abscess formation)
next_steps: Perform 16S rRNA gene sequencing and metagenomic next-generation sequencing (mNGS) on liver abscess tissue
Comprehensive immunologic workup: quantitative immunoglobulins, lymphocyte subsets, and vaccine response titers
Perform dihydrorhodamine (DHR) flow cytometry assay to evaluate for NADPH oxidase deficiency
PET/CT scan to identify the most metabolically active and accessible lesion for biopsy
Surgical consultation for possible excisional lung biopsy of the solid nodules for histopathology and specialized culture
Consultation with infectious disease experts regarding specialized culturing for B. pseudomallei
